items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a Part-Time Social Media Manager to manage our brand presence across LinkedIn, Twitter/X, and other relevant platforms. Working approximately 20 hours per week, you will create and curate content, engage with our community, and grow our social following among developers and technology decision-makers.

This is a flexible, remote role ideal for someone who wants to apply their social media expertise in the B2B technology space while maintaining work-life balance.

Responsibilities

  • Develop and manage the social media content calendar across LinkedIn and Twitter/X
  • Create engaging social content including text posts, graphics, short-form video, and threads
  • Monitor social channels and engage with followers, industry conversations, and mentions
  • Track and report on social media metrics (engagement, reach, follower growth, traffic)
  • Collaborate with content marketing and developer relations to amplify blog posts, releases, and events

Requirements

  • 3+ years of social media management experience, preferably in B2B technology
  • Strong writing skills with the ability to adapt tone for different platforms and audiences
  • Experience with social media management tools (Buffer, Hootsuite, or Sprout Social)
  • Understanding of social media analytics and reporting
  • Familiarity with the developer and technology community on social platforms

Nice to Have

  • Experience with short-form video production (Reels, TikTok-style content)
  • Graphic design skills (Canva, Figma)
  • Experience managing community forums or Discord servers
